name: shop_hint_packs
description: Three tiers of the SAME hint token (a small clean glass lightbulb with a warm filament, ONE small golden four-point star spark at its top, green coiled screw base): one lightbulb; three lightbulbs fanned; five lightbulbs clustered. Richness scales with tier.
prompt_extra: every cell repeats the identical lightbulb hint token from the reference; each subject stays small within its cell with wide empty margins on ALL sides — nothing may touch or cross a cell edge

variants.name: v4
variants.prompt_extra: a touch more glow on the large tier
